In equation 9, the inner term is a product over time-steps of the sequence, which shrinks with the length of the sequence since pctc​(ℓt|x;θ)<1subscript𝑝ctcconditionalsubscriptℓ𝑡𝑥𝜃1p_{\textrm{ctc}}(\ell_{t}|x;\theta)<1. This motivates a curriculum learning strategy we title SortaGrad. SortaGrad uses the length of the utterance as a heuristic for difficulty, since long utterances have higher cost than short utterances.
items.zh: 其中Align(x,y)是在CTC算子下，转录y的字符与输入x帧之间所有可能对齐的集合。在公式9中，内部项是序列时间步上的乘积，由于p_ctc(ℓ_t|x;θ) < 1，该乘积随序列长度而缩小。这激发了一种我们称为SortaGrad的课程学习策略。SortaGrad使用话语长度作为难度的启发式指标，因为长话语的成本高于短话语。

items.en: In the first training epoch, we iterate through the training set in increasing order of the length of the longest utterance in the minibatch. After the first epoch, training reverts back to a random order over minibatches. Table 2 shows a comparison of training cost with and without SortaGrad on the 9 layer model with 7 recurrent layers. This effect is particularly pronounced for networks without BatchNorm, since they are numerically less stable. In some sense the two techniques substitute for one another, though we still find gains when applying SortaGrad and BatchNorm together. Even with BatchNorm we find that this curriculum improves numerical stability and sensitivity to small changes in training. Numerical instability can arise from different transcendental function implementations in the CPU and the GPU, especially when computing the CTC cost. This curriculum gives comparable results for both implementations.
items.zh: 在第一个训练周期中，我们按小批量中最长话语的长度递增顺序遍历训练集。第一个周期后，训练恢复为小批量的随机顺序。表2显示了在具有7个循环层的9层模型上，使用和不使用SortaGrad的训练成本比较。这种效果对于没有BatchNorm的网络尤为明显，因为它们在数值上不太稳定。从某种意义上说，这两种技术相互替代，但我们仍然发现同时应用SortaGrad和BatchNorm时会有增益。即使使用BatchNorm，我们也发现这种课程提高了数值稳定性以及对训练中微小变化的敏感性。数值不稳定性可能源于CPU和GPU中不同的超越函数实现，尤其是在计算CTC成本时。这种课程为两种实现提供了可比的结果。

items.en: We suspect that these benefits occur primarily because long utterances tend to have larger gradients, yet we use a fixed learning rate independent of utterance length. Furthermore, longer utterances are more likely to cause the internal state of the RNNs to explode at an early stage in training.
items.zh: 我们推测这些好处主要源于长话语往往具有更大的梯度，而我们使用固定的学习率，与话语长度无关。此外，较长的语音更有可能在训练的早期阶段导致RNN内部状态爆炸。

full.sec: 3.4 Comparison of simple RNNs and GRUs

items.en: The models we have shown so far are simple RNNs that have bidirectional recurrent layers with the recurrence for both the forward in time and backward in time directions modeled by Equation 3. Current research in speech and language processing has shown that having a more complex recurrence can allow the network to remember state over more time-steps while making them more computationally expensive to train [52, 8, 62, 2]. Two commonly used recurrent architectures are the Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) units [30] and the Gated Recurrent Units (GRU) [11], though many other variations exist. A recent comprehensive study of thousands of variations of LSTM and GRU architectures showed that a GRU is comparable to an LSTM with a properly initialized forget gate bias, and their best variants are competitive with each other [32]. We decided to examine GRUs because experiments on smaller data sets showed the GRU and LSTM reach similar accuracy for the same number of parameters, but the GRUs were faster to train and less likely to diverge.
items.zh: 到目前为止，我们展示的模型是简单的RNN，具有双向循环层，其前向和后向时间方向的循环均由公式3建模。当前语音和语言处理的研究表明，更复杂的循环可以使网络在更多时间步上记住状态，同时使训练计算成本更高[52, 8, 62, 2]。两种常用的循环架构是长短期记忆（LSTM）单元[30]和门控循环单元（GRU）[11]，尽管还存在许多其他变体。最近一项对数千种LSTM和GRU架构变体的全面研究表明，GRU与具有适当初始化遗忘门偏置的LSTM相当，并且它们的最佳变体彼此具有竞争力[32]。我们决定研究GRU，因为在小数据集上的实验表明，在相同参数数量下，GRU和LSTM达到相似的准确率，但GRU训练更快且更不容易发散。

items.en: where σ​(⋅)𝜎⋅\sigma(\cdot) is the sigmoid function, z𝑧z and r𝑟r represent the update and reset gates respectively, and we drop the layer superscripts for simplicity. We differ slightly from the standard GRU in that we multiply the hidden state ht−1subscriptℎ𝑡1h_{t-1} by Uhsubscript𝑈ℎU_{h} prior to scaling by the reset gate. This allows for all operations on ht−1subscriptℎ𝑡1h_{t-1} to be computed in a single matrix multiplication. The output nonlinearity f​(⋅)𝑓⋅f(\cdot) is typically the hyperbolic tangent function t​a​n​h𝑡𝑎𝑛ℎtanh. However, we find similar performance for t​a​n​h𝑡𝑎𝑛ℎtanh and clipped-ReLU nonlinearities and choose to use the clipped-ReLU for simplicity and uniformity with the rest of the network.
items.zh: 其中σ(·)是sigmoid函数，z和r分别表示更新门和重置门，为简单起见我们省略了层上标。我们与标准GRU略有不同，我们在通过重置门缩放之前，将隐藏状态h_{t-1}乘以U_h。这使得所有对h_{t-1}的操作可以在单个矩阵乘法中计算。输出非线性f(·)通常是双曲正切函数tanh。然而，我们发现tanh和裁剪ReLU非线性具有相似的性能，为了简单和与网络其余部分的一致性，我们选择使用裁剪ReLU。

items.en: Both GRU and simple RNN architectures benefit from batch normalization and show strong results with deep networks. However, Table 3 shows that for a fixed number of parameters, the GRU architectures achieve better WER for all network depths. This is clear evidence of the long term dependencies inherent in the speech recognition task present both within individual words and between words. As we discuss in Section 3.8, even simple RNNs are able to implicitly learn a language model due to the large amount of training data. Interestingly, the GRU networks with 5 or more recurrent layers do not significantly improve performance. We attribute this to the thinning from 1728 hidden units per layer for 1 recurrent layer to 768 hidden units per layer for 7 recurrent layers, to keep the total number of parameters constant.
items.zh: GRU和简单RNN架构都受益于批归一化，并在深层网络上表现出强劲的结果。然而，表3显示，在固定参数数量下，GRU架构在所有网络深度上都实现了更好的词错误率（WER）。这清楚地证明了语音识别任务中固有的长期依赖关系，既存在于单个单词内部，也存在于单词之间。正如我们在第3.8节中讨论的，即使是简单的RNN，由于大量的训练数据，也能够隐式学习语言模型。有趣的是，具有5个或更多循环层的GRU网络并没有显著提高性能。我们将其归因于为了保持总参数数量不变，从1个循环层的每层1728个隐藏单元减少到7个循环层的每层768个隐藏单元。

items.en: The GRU networks outperform the simple RNNs in Table 3. However, in later results (Section 6) we find that as we scale up the model size, for a fixed computational budget the simple RNN networks perform slightly better. Given this, most of the remaining experiments use the simple RNN layers rather than the GRUs.
items.zh: 表3中GRU网络优于简单RNN。然而，在后面的结果（第6节）中，我们发现随着模型规模的扩大，在固定计算预算下，简单RNN网络的表现略好。鉴于此，剩余的大多数实验使用简单RNN层而不是GRU。

items.en: Temporal convolution is commonly used in speech recognition to efficiently model temporal translation invariance for variable length utterances. This type of convolution was first proposed for neural networks in speech more than 25 years ago [67]. Many neural network speech models have a first layer that processes input frames with some context window [16, 66]. This can be viewed as a temporal convolution with a stride of one.
items.zh: 时间卷积通常用于语音识别，以有效建模可变长度话语的时间平移不变性。这种卷积在25年前首次被提出用于语音神经网络[67]。许多神经网络语音模型的第一层使用一些上下文窗口处理输入帧[16, 66]。这可以看作步长为1的时间卷积。

items.en: Additionally, sub-sampling is essential to make recurrent neural networks computationally tractable with high sample-rate audio. The DS1 system accomplished this through the use of a spectrogram as input and temporal convolution in the first layer with a stride parameter to reduce the number of time-steps [26].
items.zh: 此外，子采样对于使循环神经网络在高采样率音频下计算可行至关重要。DS1系统通过使用频谱图作为输入并在第一层中使用具有步长参数的时间卷积来减少时间步数来实现这一点[26]。

items.en: Convolutions in frequency and time domains, when applied to the spectral input features prior to any other processing, can slightly improve ASR performance [1, 53, 60]. Convolution in frequency attempts to model spectral variance due to speaker variability more concisely than what is possible with large fully connected networks. Since spectral ordering of features is removed by fully-connected and recurrent layers, frequency convolutions work better as the first layers of the network.
items.zh: 在频率和时间域上的卷积，当应用于任何其他处理之前的频谱输入特征时，可以略微提高ASR性能[1, 53, 60]。频率卷积试图比大型全连接网络更简洁地建模由说话人变异性引起的频谱方差。由于全连接层和循环层会移除特征的频谱顺序，频率卷积作为网络的第一层效果更好。

items.en: We experiment with adding between one and three layers of convolution. These are both in the time-and-frequency domain (2D invariance) and in the time-only domain (1D invariance). In all cases we use a same convolution, preserving the number of input features in both frequency and time. In some cases, we specify a stride across either dimension which reduces the size of the output. We do not explicitly control for the number of parameters, since convolutional layers add a small fraction of parameters to our networks. All networks shown in Table 4 have about 35 million parameters.
items.zh: 我们尝试添加一到三层卷积。这些卷积既包括时间和频率域（2D不变性），也包括仅时间域（1D不变性）。在所有情况下，我们使用相同卷积，保持频率和时间上的输入特征数量不变。在某些情况下，我们指定跨维度的步长，这会减小输出的大小。我们没有显式控制参数数量，因为卷积层为我们的网络增加了少量参数。表4中显示的所有网络大约有3500万个参数。

items.en: We report results on two datasets—a development set of 2048 utterances (“Regular Dev”) and a much noisier dataset of 2048 utterances (“Noisy Dev”) randomly sampled from the CHiME 2015 development datasets [4]. We find that multiple layers of 1D-invariant convolutions provides a very small benefit. The 2D-invariant convolutions improve results substantially on noisy data, while providing a small benefit on clean data. The change from one layer of 1D-invariant convolution to three layers of 2D-invariant convolution improves WER by 23.9% on the noisy development set.
items.zh: 我们在两个数据集上报告结果——一个包含2048个话语的开发集（“常规开发集”）和一个从CHiME 2015开发数据集[4]中随机采样的更嘈杂的2048个话语数据集（“嘈杂开发集”）。我们发现多层1D不变卷积提供了非常小的好处。2D不变卷积在嘈杂数据上显著改善了结果，同时在干净数据上提供了小的好处。从一层1D不变卷积改为三层2D不变卷积，在嘈杂开发集上将WER提高了23.9%。

items.en: In the convolutional layers, we apply a longer stride and wider context to speed up training as fewer time-steps are required to model a given utterance. Downsampling the input sound (through FFT and convolutional striding) reduces the number of time-steps and computation required in the following layers, but at the expense of reduced performance.
items.zh: 在卷积层中，我们应用更长的步长和更宽的上下文以加速训练，因为建模给定话语所需的时间步更少。对输入声音进行下采样（通过FFT和卷积步长）减少了后续层中的时间步数和计算量，但以性能下降为代价。

items.en: In our Mandarin models, we employ striding in the straightforward way. However, in English, striding can reduce accuracy simply because the output of our network requires at least one time-step per output character, and the number of characters in English speech per time-step is high enough to cause problems when striding222Chinese characters are more similar to English syllables than English characters. This is reflected in our training data, where there are on average 14.1 characters/s in English, while only 3.3 characters/s in Mandarin. Conversely, the Shannon entropy per character as calculated from occurrence in the training set, is less in English due to the smaller character set—4.9 bits/char compared to 12.6 bits/char in Mandarin. This implies that spoken Mandarin has a lower temporal entropy density, ∼similar-to\sim41 bits/s compared to ∼similar-to\sim58 bits/s, and can thus more easily be temporally compressed without losing character information.. To overcome this, we can enrich the English alphabet with symbols representing alternate labellings like whole words, syllables or non-overlapping n-grams. In practice, we use non-overlapping bi-graphemes or bigrams, since these are simple to construct, unlike syllables, and there are few of them compared to alternatives such as whole words. We transform unigram labels into bigram labels through a simple isomorphism.
items.zh: 在我们的普通话模型中，我们以直接的方式使用步长。然而，在英语中，步长可能会降低准确率，仅仅因为我们的网络输出每个输出字符至少需要一个时间步，而英语语音中每时间步的字符数高到足以在步长时引起问题。为了克服这一点，我们可以用代表替代标签（如整个单词、音节或非重叠n-gram）的符号来丰富英语字母表。在实践中，我们使用非重叠双字素或双字母组，因为它们构造简单（不像音节），并且与诸如整个单词之类的替代方案相比数量很少。我们通过一个简单的同构将单字母标签转换为双字母标签。

items.en: Non-overlapping bigrams shorten the length of the output transcription and thus allow for a decrease in the length of the unrolled RNN. The sentence the cat sat with non-overlapping bigrams is segmented as [t​h,e,s​p​a​c​e,c​a,t,s​p​a​c​e,s​a,t]𝑡ℎ𝑒𝑠𝑝𝑎𝑐𝑒𝑐𝑎𝑡𝑠𝑝𝑎𝑐𝑒𝑠𝑎𝑡[th,e,space,ca,t,space,sa,t]. Notice that for words with odd number of characters, the last character becomes an unigram and s​p​a​c​e𝑠𝑝𝑎𝑐𝑒space is treated as an unigram as well. This isomorphism ensures that the same words are always composed of the same bigram and unigram tokens. The output set of bigrams consists of all bigrams that occur in the training set.
items.zh: 非重叠双字母组缩短了输出转录的长度，从而允许减少展开RNN的长度。句子“the cat sat”使用非重叠双字母组分割为[th, e, space, ca, t, space, sa, t]。注意，对于奇数个字符的单词，最后一个字符成为单字母组，并且空格也被视为单字母组。这种同构确保相同的单词总是由相同的双字母组和单字母组标记组成。输出双字母组集由训练集中出现的所有双字母组组成。

items.en: In Table 5 we show results for both the bigram and unigram systems for various levels of striding, with or without a language model. We observe that bigrams allow for larger strides without any sacrifice in in the word error rate. This allows us to reduce the number of time-steps of the unrolled RNN benefiting both computation and memory usage.
items.zh: 在表5中，我们展示了双字母组和单字母组系统在不同步长级别下，有或没有语言模型的结果。我们观察到双字母组允许更大的步长而不会牺牲词错误率。这使我们能够减少展开RNN的时间步数，从而有利于计算和内存使用。

items.en: Bidirectional RNN models are challenging to deploy in an online, low-latency setting, because they are built to operate on an entire sample, and so it is not possible to perform the transcription process as the utterance streams from the user. We have found an unidirectional architecture that performs as well as our bidirectional models. This allows us to use unidirectional, forward-only RNN layers in our deployment system.
items.zh: 双向RNN模型难以在在线、低延迟环境中部署，因为它们设计用于处理整个样本，因此无法在用户语音流式传输时执行转录过程。我们发现了一种单向架构，其性能与我们的双向模型相当。这使我们能够在部署系统中使用单向、仅前向的RNN层。

items.capEn: Figure 3: Row convolution architecture with future context size of 2
items.capZh: 图3：未来上下文大小为2的行卷积架构

items.en: To accomplish this, we employ a special layer that we call row convolution, shown in Figure 3. The intuition behind this layer is that we only need a small portion of future information to make an accurate prediction at the current time-step. Suppose at time-step t𝑡t, we use a future context of τ𝜏\tau steps. We now have a feature matrix ht:t+τ=[ht,ht+1,…,ht+τ]subscriptℎ:𝑡𝑡𝜏subscriptℎ𝑡subscriptℎ𝑡1…subscriptℎ𝑡𝜏h_{t:t+\tau}=[h_{t},h_{t+1},...,h_{t+\tau}] of size d×(τ+1)𝑑𝜏1d\times(\tau+1). We define a parameter matrix W𝑊W of the same size as ht:t+τsubscriptℎ:𝑡𝑡𝜏h_{t:t+\tau}. The activations rtsubscript𝑟𝑡r_{t} for the new layer at time-step t𝑡t are
items.zh: 为了实现这一点，我们采用了一种称为行卷积的特殊层，如图3所示。该层的直觉是，我们只需要一小部分未来信息即可在当前时间步做出准确预测。假设在时间步t，我们使用未来上下文τ步。现在我们有一个大小为d×(τ+1)的特征矩阵h_{t:t+τ}=[h_t, h_{t+1}, ..., h_{t+τ}]。我们定义一个与h_{t:t+τ}大小相同的参数矩阵W。新层在时间步t的激活r_t为

items.en: Since the convolution-like operation in Eq. 11 is row oriented for both W𝑊W and ht:t+τsubscriptℎ:𝑡𝑡𝜏h_{t:t+\tau}, we call this layer row convolution.
items.zh: 由于公式11中的类卷积操作对W和h_{t:t+τ}都是行导向的，我们将这一层称为行卷积层。

items.en: We place the row convolution layer above all recurrent layers. This has two advantages. First, this allows us to stream all computation below the row convolution layer on a finer granularity given little future context is needed. Second, this results in better CER compared to the best bidirectional model for Mandarin. We conjecture that the recurrent layers have learned good feature representations, so the row convolution layer simply gathers the appropriate information to feed to the classifier. Results for a unidirectional Mandarin speech system with row convolution and a comparison to a bidirectional model are given in Section 7 on deployment.
items.zh: 我们将行卷积层放置在所有循环层之上。这有两个优点。首先，这使得我们可以在行卷积层之下以更细粒度进行流式计算，因为只需要很少的未来上下文。其次，与最佳的双向模型相比，这为普通话带来了更低的字符错误率。我们推测循环层已经学习了良好的特征表示，因此行卷积层只需收集适当的信息提供给分类器。使用行卷积的单向普通话语音系统的结果以及与双向模型的比较在第7节部署部分给出。

items.en: We train our RNN Models over millions of unique utterances, which enables the network to learn a powerful implicit language model. Our best models are quite adept at spelling, without any external language constraints. Further, in our development datasets we find many cases where our models can implicitly disambiguate homophones—for example, “he expects the Japanese agent to sell it for two hundred seventy five thousand dollars”. Nevertheless, the labeled training data is small compared to the size of unlabeled text corpora that are available. Thus we find that WER improves when we supplement our system with a language model trained from external text.
items.zh: 我们在数百万个独特的话语上训练RNN模型，这使得网络能够学习强大的隐式语言模型。我们的最佳模型在拼写方面相当熟练，无需任何外部语言约束。此外，在我们的开发数据集中，我们发现许多模型能够隐式消除同音词歧义的例子——例如，“he expects the Japanese agent to sell it for two hundred seventy five thousand dollars”。然而，与可用的未标注文本语料库规模相比，标注训练数据仍然较小。因此，我们发现当用外部文本训练的语言模型补充系统时，词错误率有所改善。

items.en: We use an n-gram language model since they scale well to large amounts of unlabeled text [26]. For English, our language model is a Kneser-Ney smoothed 5-gram model with pruning that is trained using the KenLM toolkit [28] on cleaned text from the Common Crawl Repository333http://commoncrawl.org. The vocabulary is the most frequently used 400,000 words from 250 million lines of text, which produces a language model with about 850 million n-grams. For Mandarin, the language model is a Kneser-Ney smoothed character level 5-gram model with pruning that is trained on an internal text corpus of 8 billion lines of text. This produces a language model with about 2 billion n-grams.
items.zh: 我们使用n-gram语言模型，因为它们能很好地扩展到大量未标注文本[26]。对于英语，我们的语言模型是使用KenLM工具包[28]在Common Crawl仓库（http://commoncrawl.org）的清洗文本上训练的经过剪枝的Kneser-Ney平滑5-gram模型。词汇表是从2.5亿行文本中选取的最常用的40万个词，产生的语言模型包含约8.5亿个n-gram。对于普通话，语言模型是在80亿行文本的内部语料库上训练的经过剪枝的Kneser-Ney平滑字符级5-gram模型，产生的语言模型包含约20亿个n-gram。

items.en: During inference we search for the transcription y𝑦y that maximizes Q​(y)𝑄𝑦Q(y) shown in Equation 12. This is a linear combination of log\log probabilities from the CTC trained network and language model, along with a word insertion term [26].
items.zh: 在推理过程中，我们搜索使公式12中Q(y)最大化的转录y。这是来自CTC训练网络和语言模型的对数概率的线性组合，加上一个词插入项[26]。

items.en: The weight α𝛼\alpha controls the relative contributions of the language model and the CTC network. The weight β𝛽\beta encourages more words in the transcription. These parameters are tuned on a development set. We use a beam search to find the optimal transcription [27].
items.zh: 权重α控制语言模型和CTC网络的相对贡献。权重β鼓励转录中出现更多词。这些参数在开发集上调整。我们使用束搜索来找到最优转录[27]。

items.en: The relative performance improvement from a language model is higher in English than in Mandarin. We attribute this to the fact that a Chinese character represents a larger block of information than an English character. For example, if we output directly to syllables or words in English, the model would make fewer spelling mistakes and the language model would likely help less.
items.zh: 语言模型带来的相对性能提升在英语中比在普通话中更高。我们将此归因于一个汉字比一个英文字符代表更大的信息块。例如，如果我们在英语中直接输出音节或词，模型会犯更少的拼写错误，语言模型的帮助可能更小。

items.en: The techniques that we have described so far can be used to build an end-to-end Mandarin speech recognition system that outputs Chinese characters directly. This precludes the need to construct a pronunciation model, which is often a fairly involved component for porting speech systems to other languages [59]. Direct output to characters also precludes the need to explicitly model language specific pronunciation features. For example we do not need to model Mandarin tones explicitly, as some speech systems must do [59, 45].
items.zh: 到目前为止描述的技术可用于构建端到端的普通话语音识别系统，直接输出汉字。这避免了构建发音模型的需要，而发音模型通常是将语音系统移植到其他语言时相当复杂的组件[59]。直接输出字符也避免了对语言特定发音特征进行显式建模的需要。例如，我们不需要像某些语音系统那样显式建模普通话声调[59, 45]。

items.en: The only architectural changes we make to our networks are due to the characteristics of the Chinese character set. Firstly, the output layer of the network outputs about 6000 characters, which includes the Roman alphabet, since hybrid Chinese-English transcripts are common. We incur an out of vocabulary error at evaluation time if a character is not contained in this set. This is not a major concern, as our test set has only 0.74% out of vocab characters.
items.zh: 我们对网络所做的唯一架构更改是由于中文字符集的特点。首先，网络的输出层输出约6000个字符，其中包括罗马字母，因为中英文混合转录很常见。如果在评估时遇到不在该集合中的字符，我们会产生词汇外错误。这不是主要问题，因为我们的测试集只有0.74%的词汇外字符。

items.en: We use a character level language model in Mandarin as words are not usually segmented in text. The word insertion term of Equation 12 becomes a character insertion term. In addition, we find that the performance of the beam search during decoding levels off at a smaller beam size. This allows us to use a beam size of 200 with a negligible degradation in CER. In Section 6.2, we show that our Mandarin speech models show roughly the same improvements to architectural changes as our English speech models.
items.zh: 我们在普通话中使用字符级语言模型，因为文本中的词通常不分词。公式12中的词插入项变为字符插入项。此外，我们发现解码过程中束搜索的性能在较小的束大小时趋于平稳。这使得我们可以使用200的束大小，而字符错误率下降可忽略不计。在第6.2节中，我们展示了我们的普通话语音模型在架构变化上显示出与英语语音模型大致相同的改进。

items.en: Our networks have tens of millions of parameters, and the training algorithm takes tens of single-precision exaFLOPs to converge. Since our ability to evaluate hypotheses about our data and models depends on the ability to train models quickly, we built a highly optimized training system. This system has two main components—a deep learning library written in C++, along with a high-performance linear algebra library written in both CUDA and C++. Our optimized software, running on dense compute nodes with 8 Titan X GPUs per node, allows us to sustain 24 single-precision teraFLOP/second when training a single model on one node. This is 45%percent4545\% of the theoretical peak computational throughput of each node. We also can scale to multiple nodes, as outlined in the next subsection.
items.zh: 我们的网络有数千万个参数，训练算法需要数十个单精度exaFLOP才能收敛。由于我们评估关于数据和模型的假设的能力取决于快速训练模型的能力，我们构建了一个高度优化的训练系统。该系统有两个主要组件——一个用C++编写的深度学习库，以及一个用CUDA和C++编写的高性能线性代数库。我们的优化软件运行在配备每节点8个Titan X GPU的密集计算节点上，使得我们在一个节点上训练单个模型时能够维持每秒24万亿次单精度浮点运算。这达到了每个节点理论峰值计算吞吐量的45%。我们还可以扩展到多个节点，如下一小节所述。

items.en: We use the standard technique of data-parallelism to train on multiple GPUs using synchronous SGD. Our most common configuration uses a minibatch of 512512512 on 888 GPUs. Our training pipeline binds one process to each GPU. These processes then exchange gradient matrices during the backpropagation by using all-reduce, which exchanges a matrix between multiple processes and sums the result so that at the end, each process has a copy of the sum of all matrices from all processes.
items.zh: 我们使用标准的数据并行技术在多个GPU上使用同步SGD进行训练。我们最常见的配置是在8个GPU上使用512的小批量。我们的训练流水线将每个进程绑定到一个GPU。这些进程在反向传播期间通过使用all-reduce交换梯度矩阵，all-reduce在多个进程之间交换矩阵并对结果求和，以便最后每个进程都拥有来自所有进程的所有矩阵的和的副本。

items.en: We find synchronous SGD useful because it is reproducible and deterministic. We have found that the appearance of non-determinism in our system often signals a serious bug, and so having reproducibility as a goal has greatly facilitates debugging. In contrast, asynchronous methods such as asynchronous SGD with parameter servers as found in Dean et al. [18] typically do not provide reproducibility and are therefore more difficult to debug. Synchronous SGD is simple to understand and implement. It scales well as we add multiple nodes to the training process.
items.zh: 我们发现同步SGD很有用，因为它可重现且确定性。我们发现系统中非确定性的出现通常表明存在严重错误，因此将可重现性作为目标极大地促进了调试。相比之下，异步方法（如Dean等人[18]中的参数服务器异步SGD）通常不提供可重现性，因此更难调试。同步SGD易于理解和实现。随着我们向训练过程添加多个节点，它扩展性良好。

items.capEn: Figure 4: Scaling comparison of two networks—a 5 layer model with 3 recurrent layers containing 2560 hidden units in each layer and a 9 layer model with 7 recurrent layers containing 1760 hidden units in each layer. The times shown are to train 1 epoch. The 5 layer model trains faster because it uses larger matrices and is more computationally efficient.
items.capZh: 图4：两个网络的扩展性比较——一个5层模型，包含3个循环层，每层2560个隐藏单元；一个9层模型，包含7个循环层，每层1760个隐藏单元。显示的时间是训练1个epoch所需时间。5层模型训练更快，因为它使用更大的矩阵，计算效率更高。

items.en: Since all-reduce is critical to the scalability of our training, we wrote our own implementation of the ring algorithm [48, 65] for higher performance and better stability. Our implementation avoids extraneous copies between CPU and GPU, and is fundamental to our scalability. We configure OpenMPI with the smcuda transport that can send and receive buffers residing in the memory of two different GPUs by using GPUDirect. When two GPUs are in the same PCI root complex, this avoids any unnecessary copies to CPU memory. This also takes advantage of tree-structured interconnects by running multiple segments of the ring concurrently between neighboring devices. We built our implementation using MPI send and receive, along with CUDA kernels for the element-wise operations.
items.zh: 由于all-reduce对我们训练的可扩展性至关重要，我们编写了自己的环算法实现[48, 65]，以获得更高性能和更好稳定性。我们的实现避免了CPU和GPU之间的额外拷贝，并且是我们可扩展性的基础。我们配置OpenMPI使用smcuda传输，该传输可以通过GPUDirect发送和接收位于两个不同GPU内存中的缓冲区。当两个GPU位于同一PCI根复合体中时，这避免了任何不必要的CPU内存拷贝。这还通过相邻设备之间并发运行环的多个段来利用树形结构互连。我们使用MPI发送和接收以及用于逐元素操作的CUDA内核构建了我们的实现。

items.en: All of our training runs use either 8 or 16 GPUs, and in this regime, our all-reduce implementation results in 2.5×2.5\times faster training for the full training run, compared to using OpenMPI directly. Optimizing all-reduce has thus resulted in important productivity benefits for our experiments, and has made our simple synchronous SGD approach scalable.
items.zh: 我们所有的训练运行使用8或16个GPU，在这种设置下，与直接使用OpenMPI相比，我们的all-reduce实现使整个训练运行速度提高了2.5倍。因此，优化all-reduce为我们的实验带来了重要的生产力提升，并使我们的简单同步SGD方法具有可扩展性。

full.sec: 4.2 GPU implementation of CTC loss function

items.en: Calculating the CTC loss function is more complicated than performing forward and back propagation on our RNN architectures. Originally, we transferred activations from the GPUs to the CPU, where we calculated the loss function using an OpenMP parallelized implementation of CTC. However, this implementation limited our scalability rather significantly, for two reasons. Firstly, it became computationally more significant as we improved efficiency and scalability of the RNN itself. Secondly, transferring large activation matrices between CPU and GPU required us to spend interconnect bandwidth for CTC, rather than on transferring gradient matrices to allow us to scale using data parallelism to more processors.
items.zh: 计算CTC损失函数比在我们的RNN架构上执行前向和反向传播更复杂。最初，我们将激活从GPU传输到CPU，在那里使用OpenMP并行化的CTC实现计算损失函数。然而，这种实现相当严重地限制了我们的可扩展性，原因有二。首先，随着我们提高RNN本身的效率和可扩展性，它变得计算上更重要。其次，在CPU和GPU之间传输大型激活矩阵要求我们将互连带宽用于CTC，而不是用于传输梯度矩阵以使我们能够通过数据并行扩展到更多处理器。

items.en: To overcome this, we wrote a GPU implementation of the CTC loss function. Our parallel implementation relies on a slight refactoring to simplify the dependences in the CTC calculation, as well as the use of optimized parallel sort implementations from ModernGPU [5]. We give more details of this parallelization in the Appendix.
items.zh: 为了克服这一点，我们编写了CTC损失函数的GPU实现。我们的并行实现依赖于对CTC计算中的依赖关系进行轻微重构，以及使用ModernGPU [5]中的优化并行排序实现。我们在附录中提供了更多关于这种并行化的细节。

items.en: Our system makes frequent use of dynamic memory allocations to GPU and CPU memory, mainly to store activation data for variable length utterances, and for intermediate results. Individual allocations can be very large; over 1 GB for the longest utterances. For these very large allocations we found that CUDA’s memory allocator and even std::malloc introduced significant overhead into our application—over a 2x slowdown from using std::malloc in some cases. This is because both cudaMalloc and std::malloc forward very large allocations to the operating system or GPU driver to update the system page tables. This is a good optimization for systems running multiple applications, all sharing memory resources, but editing page tables is pure overhead for our system where nodes are dedicated entirely to running a single model. To get around this limitation, we wrote our own memory allocator for both CPU and GPU allocations. Our implementation follows the approach of the last level shared allocator in jemalloc: all allocations are carved out of contiguous memory blocks using the buddy algorithm [34]. To avoid fragmentation, we preallocate all of GPU memory at the start of training and subdivide individual allocations from this block. Similarly, we set the CPU memory block size that we forward to mmap to be substantially larger than std::malloc, at 12GB.
items.zh: 我们的系统频繁使用GPU和CPU内存的动态内存分配，主要用于存储可变长度话语的激活数据和中间结果。单个分配可能非常大；对于最长的话语超过1 GB。对于这些非常大的分配，我们发现CUDA的内存分配器甚至std::malloc给我们的应用程序带来了显著的开销——在某些情况下，使用std::malloc导致超过2倍的减速。这是因为cudaMalloc和std::malloc都将非常大的分配转发给操作系统或GPU驱动程序以更新系统页表。这对于运行多个应用程序、共享内存资源的系统来说是一个很好的优化，但对于我们的系统（节点完全专用于运行单个模型）来说，编辑页表是纯粹的开销。为了克服这个限制，我们编写了自己的CPU和GPU内存分配器。我们的实现遵循jemalloc中最后一级共享分配器的方法：所有分配都使用伙伴算法[34]从连续内存块中划分出来。为了避免碎片化，我们在训练开始时预分配所有GPU内存，并从该块中细分各个分配。类似地，我们将转发给mmap的CPU内存块大小设置为比std::malloc大得多，为12GB。

items.en: Most of the memory required for training deep recurrent networks is used to store activations through each layer for use by back propagation, not to store the parameters of the network. For example, storing the weights for a 70M parameter network with 9 layers requires approximately 280 MB of memory, but storing the activations for a batch of 64, seven-second utterances requires 1.5 GB of memory. TitanX GPUs include 12GB of GDDR5 RAM, and sometimes very deep networks can exceed the GPU memory capacity when processing long utterances. This can happen unpredictably, especially when the distribution of utterance lengths includes outliers, and it is desirable to avoid a catastrophic failure when this occurs. When a requested memory allocation exceeds available GPU memory, we allocate page-locked GPU-memory-mapped CPU memory using cudaMallocHost instead. This memory can be accessed directly by the GPU by forwarding individual memory transactions over PCIe at reduced bandwidth, and it allows a model to continue to make progress even after encountering an outlier.
items.zh: 训练深度循环网络所需的大部分内存用于存储每层的激活以供反向传播使用，而不是存储网络参数。例如，存储一个具有9层的7000万参数网络的权重需要大约280 MB内存，但存储一批64个、7秒长的话语的激活需要1.5 GB内存。TitanX GPU包含12GB的GDDR5 RAM，有时非常深的网络在处理长话语时可能会超出GPU内存容量。这可能不可预测地发生，特别是当话语长度分布包含异常值时，并且希望避免在这种情况下发生灾难性故障。当请求的内存分配超过可用GPU内存时，我们改用cudaMallocHost分配页锁定GPU内存映射的CPU内存。GPU可以通过PCIe以降低的带宽转发单个内存事务直接访问此内存，这允许模型即使在遇到异常值后也能继续取得进展。

items.en: The combination of fast memory allocation with a fallback mechanism that allows us to slightly overflow available GPU memory in exceptional cases makes the system significantly simpler, more robust, and more efficient.
items.zh: 快速内存分配与后备机制的结合，使我们能够在特殊情况下略微溢出可用GPU内存，从而使系统显著更简单、更鲁棒且更高效。

items.en: Large-scale deep learning systems require an abundance of labeled training data. We have collected an extensive training dataset for both English and Mandarin speech models, in addition to augmenting our training with publicly available datasets. In English we use 11,940 hours of labeled speech data containing 8 million utterances summarized in Table 9. For the Mandarin system we use 9,400 hours of labeled audio containing 11 million utterances. The Mandarin speech data consists of internal Baidu corpora, representing a mix of read speech and spontaneous speech, in both standard Mandarin and accented Mandarin.
items.zh: 大规模深度学习系统需要大量标注训练数据。我们为英语和普通话语音模型收集了广泛的训练数据集，此外还使用公开数据集扩充训练。英语方面，我们使用11940小时标注语音数据，包含800万个话语，总结于表9。普通话系统使用9400小时标注音频，包含1100万个话语。普通话语音数据由百度内部语料库组成，混合了朗读语音和自发性语音，包括标准普通话和带口音的普通话。

items.en: Some of the internal English (3,600 hours) and Mandarin (1,400 hours) datasets were created from raw data captured as long audio clips with noisy transcriptions. The length of these clips ranged from several minutes to more than hour, making it impractical to unroll them in time in the RNN during training. To solve this problem, we developed an alignment, segmentation and filtering pipeline that can generate a training set with shorter utterances and few erroneous transcriptions.
items.zh: 部分内部英语（3600小时）和普通话（1400小时）数据集是从原始数据创建的，这些原始数据以长音频片段形式捕获，并带有噪声转录。这些片段的长度从几分钟到超过一小时不等，使得在训练期间在RNN中按时间展开变得不切实际。为解决此问题，我们开发了一个对齐、分割和过滤流水线，能够生成具有较短话语和较少错误转录的训练集。

items.en: The first step in the pipeline is to use an existing bidirectional RNN model trained with CTC to align the transcription to the frames of audio. For a given audio-transcript pair, (x,y)𝑥𝑦(x,y), we find the alignment that maximizes
items.zh: 流水线的第一步是使用现有的、使用CTC训练的RNN模型将转录与音频帧对齐。对于给定的音频-转录对(x,y)，我们找到最大化以下公式的对齐：

items.en: This is essentially a Viterbi alignment found using a RNN model trained with CTC. Since Equation 9 integrates over the alignment, the CTC loss function is never explicitly asked to produce an accurate alignment. In principle, CTC could choose to emit all the characters of the transcription after some fixed delay and this can happen with unidirectional RNNs [54]. However, we found that CTC produces an accurate alignment when trained with a bidirectional RNN.
items.zh: 这本质上是使用CTC训练的RNN模型找到的维特比对齐。由于公式9在对齐上积分，CTC损失函数从未被明确要求产生精确对齐。原则上，CTC可以选择在某个固定延迟后发出转录的所有字符，这在单向RNN中可能发生[54]。然而，我们发现当使用双向RNN训练时，CTC能产生精确对齐。

items.en: Following the alignment is a segmentation step that splices the audio and the corresponding aligned transcription whenever it encounters a long series of consecutive blank labels occurs, since this usually denotes a stretch of silence. By tuning the number of consecutive blanks, we can tune the length of the utterances generated. For the English speech data, we also require a space token to be within the stretch of blanks in order to segment only on word boundaries. We tune the segmentation to generate utterances that are on average 7 seconds long.
items.zh: 对齐之后是分割步骤，每当遇到连续空白标签的长序列时，将音频和相应的对齐转录拼接起来，因为这通常表示一段静音。通过调整连续空白的数量，我们可以调整生成话语的长度。对于英语语音数据，我们还要求在空白段内包含空格标记，以便仅在单词边界进行分割。我们调整分割以生成平均长度为7秒的话语。

items.en: The final step in the pipeline removes erroneous examples that arise from a failed alignment. We crowd source the ground truth transcriptions for several thousand examples. The word level edit distance between the ground truth and the aligned transcription is used to produce a good or bad label. The threshold for the word level edit distance is chosen such that the resulting WER of the good portion of the development set is less than 5%. We then train a linear classifier to accurately predict bad examples given the input features generated from the speech recognizer. We find the following features useful: the raw CTC cost, the CTC cost normalized by the sequence length, the CTC cost normalized by the transcript length, the ratio of the sequence length to the transcript length, the number of words in the transcription and the number of characters in the transcription. For the English dataset, we find that the filtering pipeline reduces the WER from 17% to 5% while retaining more than 50% of the examples.
items.zh: 流水线的最后一步是移除因对齐失败而产生的错误示例。我们通过众包获取数千个示例的真实转录。使用真实转录与对齐转录之间的词级编辑距离来生成好或坏的标签。选择词级编辑距离的阈值，使得开发集好部分的词错误率低于5%。然后，我们训练一个线性分类器，根据语音识别器生成的输入特征准确预测坏示例。我们发现以下特征有用：原始CTC代价、按序列长度归一化的CTC代价、按转录长度归一化的CTC代价、序列长度与转录长度的比率、转录中的单词数和转录中的字符数。对于英语数据集，我们发现过滤流水线将词错误率从17%降低到5%，同时保留了超过50%的示例。

items.en: We augment our training data by adding noise to increase the effective size of our training data and to improve our robustness to noisy speech [26]. Although the training data contains some intrinsic noise, we can increase the quantity and variety of noise through augmentation. Too much noise augmentation tends to make optimization difficult and can lead to worse results, and too little noise augmentation makes the system less robust to low signal-to-noise speech. We find that a good balance is to add noise to 40% of the utterances that are chosen at random. The noise source consists of several thousand hours of randomly selected audio clips combined to produce hundreds of hours of noise.
items.zh: 我们通过添加噪声来扩充训练数据，以增加训练数据的有效大小并提高对噪声语音的鲁棒性[26]。尽管训练数据包含一些固有噪声，但我们可以通过数据增强增加噪声的数量和多样性。过多的噪声增强往往会使优化变得困难，并可能导致更差的结果；而过少的噪声增强会使系统对低信噪比语音的鲁棒性降低。我们发现一个好的平衡是随机选择40%的话语添加噪声。噪声源由随机选择的数千小时音频片段组合而成，产生数百小时的噪声。

items.en: Our English and Mandarin corpora are substantially larger than those commonly reported in speech recognition literature. In Table 10, we show the effect of increasing the amount of labeled training data on WER. This is done by randomly sampling the full dataset before training. For each dataset, the model was trained for up to 20 epochs though usually early-stopped based on the error on a held out development set. We note that the WER decreases with a power law for both the regular and noisy development sets. The WER decreases by ∼similar-to\sim40% relative for each factor of 10 increase in training set size. We also observe a consistent gap in WER (∼similar-to\sim60% relative) between the regular and noisy datasets, implying that more data benefits both cases equally.
items.zh: 我们的英语和普通话语料库比语音识别文献中通常报告的规模大得多。在表10中，我们展示了增加标注训练数据量对词错误率的影响。这是通过在训练前随机采样完整数据集实现的。对于每个数据集，模型训练最多20个周期，但通常根据保留开发集上的误差提前停止。我们注意到，对于常规和噪声开发集，词错误率均以幂律下降。训练集大小每增加10倍，词错误率相对降低约40%。我们还观察到常规和噪声数据集之间词错误率存在一致差距（相对约60%），这意味着更多数据对两种情况都有同等益处。

items.en: This implies that a speech system will continue to improve with more labeled training data. We hypothesize that equally as important as increasing raw number of hours is increasing the number of speech contexts that are captured in the dataset. A context can be any property that makes speech unique including different speakers, background noise, environment, and microphone hardware. While we do not have the labels needed to validate this claim, we suspect that measuring WER as a function of speakers in the dataset would lead to much larger relative gains than simple random sampling.
items.zh: 这表明语音系统将随着更多标注训练数据而持续改进。我们假设，与增加原始小时数同样重要的是增加数据集中捕获的语音上下文数量。上下文可以是使语音独特的任何属性，包括不同的说话人、背景噪声、环境和麦克风硬件。虽然我们没有验证这一说法所需的标签，但我们怀疑，将词错误率作为数据集中说话人数的函数来衡量，将导致比简单随机采样大得多的相对收益。

items.en: To better assess the real-world applicability of our speech system, we evaluate on a wide range of test sets. We use several publicly available benchmarks and several test sets collected internally. Together these test sets represent a wide range of challenging speech environments including low signal-to-noise ratios (noisy and far-field), accented, read, spontaneous and conversational speech.
items.zh: 为了更好地评估我们语音系统的实际适用性，我们在广泛的测试集上进行了评估。我们使用了几个公开可用的基准测试和几个内部收集的测试集。这些测试集共同代表了各种具有挑战性的语音环境，包括低信噪比（噪声和远场）、带口音、朗读、自发和对话语音。

items.en: All models are trained for 20 epochs on either the full English dataset, described in Table 9, or the full Mandarin dataset described in Section 5. We use stochastic gradient descent with Nesterov momentum [61] along with a minibatch of 512 utterances. If the norm of the gradient exceeds a threshold of 400, it is rescaled to 400 [47]. The model which performs the best on a held-out development set during training is chosen for evaluation. The learning rate is chosen from [1×10−4,6×10−4]1superscript1046superscript104[1\times 10^{-4},6\times 10^{-4}] to yield fastest convergence and annealed by a constant factor of 1.2 after each epoch. We use a momentum of 0.99 for all models.
items.zh: 所有模型均在完整英语数据集（如表9所述）或完整普通话语料库（如第5节所述）上训练20个周期。我们使用带有Nesterov动量的随机梯度下降[61]以及512个话语的小批量。如果梯度范数超过阈值400，则将其重新缩放为400[47]。选择训练期间在保留开发集上表现最佳的模型进行评估。学习率从[1×10^-4, 6×10^-4]中选择以实现最快收敛，并在每个周期后按常数因子1.2退火。所有模型均使用0.99的动量。

items.en: The language models used are those described in Section 3.8. The decoding parameters from Equation 12 are tuned on a held-out development set. We use a beam size of 500 for the English decoder and a beam size of 200 for the Mandarin decoder.
items.zh: 使用的语言模型如第3.8节所述。公式12中的解码参数在保留开发集上进行调整。英语解码器使用波束大小为500，普通话解码器使用波束大小为200。

items.en: The best DS2 model has 11 layers with 3 layers of 2D convolution, 7 bidirectional recurrent layers, a fully-connected output layer along with Batch Normalization. The first layer outputs to bigrams with a temporal stride of 3. By comparison the DS1 model has 5 layers with a single bidirectional recurrent layer and it outputs to unigrams with a temporal stride of 2 in the first layer. We report results on several test sets for both the DS2 and DS1 model. We do not tune or adapt either model to any of the speech conditions in the test sets. Language model decoding parameters are set once on a held-out development set.
items.zh: 最佳DS2模型有11层，包括3层二维卷积、7层双向循环层、一个全连接输出层以及批归一化。第一层输出到二元组，时间步长为3。相比之下，DS1模型有5层，包含一个双向循环层，第一层输出到一元组，时间步长为2。我们在多个测试集上报告DS2和DS1模型的结果。我们不对任一模型针对测试集中的任何语音条件进行调整或适应。语言模型解码参数在保留开发集上一次性设置。

items.en: To put the performance of our system in context, we benchmark most of our results against human workers, since speech recognition is an audio perception and language understanding problem that humans excel at. We obtain a measure of human level performance by paying workers from Amazon Mechanical Turk to hand-transcribe all of our test sets. Two workers transcribe the same audio clip, that is typically about 5 seconds long, and we use the better of the two transcriptions for the final WER calculation. They are free to listen to the audio clip as many times as they like. These workers are mostly based in the United States, and on average spend about 27 seconds per transcription. The hand-transcribed results are compared to the existing ground truth to produce a WER. While the existing ground truth transcriptions do have some label error, this is rarely more than 1%. This implies that disagreement between the ground truth transcripts and the human level transcripts is a good heuristic for human level performance.
items.zh: 为了将我们系统的性能置于上下文中，我们将大部分结果与人类工作者进行基准比较，因为语音识别是人类擅长的音频感知和语言理解问题。我们通过支付Amazon Mechanical Turk上的工作者手动转录所有测试集来获得人类水平性能的度量。两名工作者转录同一音频片段（通常约5秒长），我们使用两个转录中较好的一个进行最终词错误率计算。他们可以随意多次收听音频片段。这些工作者主要位于美国，平均每个转录花费约27秒。将手动转录结果与现有真实转录进行比较，产生词错误率。虽然现有真实转录确实存在一些标签错误，但这很少超过1%。这意味着真实转录与人类水平转录之间的不一致是人类水平性能的良好启发式。

items.en: Our English speech training set is substantially larger than the size of commonly used speech datasets. Furthermore, the data is augmented with noise synthesis. To get the best generalization error, we expect that the model size must increase to fully exploit the patterns in the data. In Section 3.2 we explored the effect of model depth while fixing the number of parameters. In contrast, here we show the effect of varying model size on the performance of the speech system. We only vary the size of each layer, while keeping the depth and other architectural parameters constant. We evaluate the models on the same Regular and Noisy development sets that we use in Section 3.5.
items.zh: 我们的英语语音训练集比常用语音数据集大得多。此外，数据通过噪声合成进行了扩充。为了获得最佳泛化误差，我们预计模型大小必须增加以充分利用数据中的模式。在第3.2节中，我们在固定参数数量的情况下探讨了模型深度的影响。相比之下，这里我们展示了改变模型大小对语音系统性能的影响。我们仅改变每层的大小，同时保持深度和其他架构参数不变。我们在与第3.5节相同的常规和噪声开发集上评估模型。

items.en: The models in Table 11 differ from those in Table 3 in that we increase the the stride to 3 and output to bigrams. Because we increase the model size to as many as 100 million parameters, we find that an increase in stride is necessary for fast computation and memory constraints. However, in this regime we note that the performance advantage of the GRU networks appears to diminish over the simple RNN. In fact, for the 100 million parameter networks the simple RNN performs better than the GRU network and is faster to train despite the 2 extra layers of convolution.
items.zh: 表11中的模型与表3中的不同之处在于，我们将步长增加到3并输出到二元组。由于我们将模型大小增加到多达1亿个参数，我们发现增加步长对于快速计算和内存限制是必要的。然而，在这种设置下，我们注意到GRU网络的性能优势相对于简单RNN似乎减弱了。事实上，对于1亿参数的网络，简单RNN的性能优于GRU网络，并且尽管多了2层卷积，训练速度更快。

items.en: Read speech with high signal-to-noise ratio is arguably the easiest large vocabulary for a continuous speech recognition task. We benchmark our system on two test sets from the Wall Street Journal (WSJ) corpus of read news articles. These are available in the LDC catalog as LDC94S13B and LDC93S6B. We also take advantage of the recently developed LibriSpeech corpus constructed using audio books from the LibriVox project [46].
items.zh: 高信噪比的朗读语音可以说是连续语音识别任务中最容易的大词汇量任务。我们在华尔街日报（WSJ）语料库的两个测试集上对我们的系统进行基准测试，该语料库包含朗读新闻文章。这些测试集可在LDC目录中作为LDC94S13B和LDC93S6B获得。我们还利用了最近开发的LibriSpeech语料库，该语料库使用LibriVox项目的有声读物构建[46]。

items.en: Our source for accented speech is the publicly available VoxForge (http://www.voxforge.org) dataset, which has clean speech read from speakers with many different accents. We group these accents into four categories. The American-Canadian and Indian groups are self-explanatory. The Commonwealth accent denotes speakers with British, Irish, South African, Australian and New Zealand accents. The European group contains speakers with accents from countries in Europe that do not have English as a first language. We construct a test set from the VoxForge data with 1024 examples from each accent group for a total of 4096 examples.
items.zh: 我们带口音语音的来源是公开可用的VoxForge（http://www.voxforge.org）数据集，该数据集包含来自许多不同口音说话人的清晰朗读语音。我们将这些口音分为四类。美加口音和印度口音组不言自明。英联邦口音表示具有英国、爱尔兰、南非、澳大利亚和新西兰口音的说话人。欧洲组包含来自非英语母语欧洲国家的说话人口音。我们从VoxForge数据构建了一个测试集，每个口音组有1024个示例，总共4096个示例。

items.en: Performance on these test sets is to some extent a measure of the breadth and quality of our training data. Table 14 shows that our performance improved on all the accents when we include more accented training data and use an architecture that can effectively train on that data. However human level performance is still notably better than that of DS2 for all but the Indian accent.
items.zh: 这些测试集上的性能在一定程度上衡量了我们训练数据的广度和质量。表14显示，当我们包含更多带口音的训练数据并使用能够有效训练这些数据的架构时，我们在所有口音上的性能都有所提高。然而，除了印度口音外，人类水平性能仍然明显优于DS2。

items.en: We test our performance on noisy speech using the publicly available test sets from the recently completed third CHiME challenge [4]. This dataset has 1320 utterances from the WSJ test set read in various noisy environments, including a bus, a cafe, a street and a pedestrian area. The CHiME set also includes 1320 utterances with simulated noise from the same environments as well as the control set containing the same utterances delivered by the same speakers in a noise-free environment. Differences between results on the control set and the noisy sets provide a measure of the network’s ability to handle a variety of real and synthetic noise conditions. The CHiME audio has 6 channels and using all of them can provide substantial performance improvements [69]. We use a single channel for all our results, since multi-channel audio is not pervasive on most devices. Table 15 shows that DS2 substantially improves upon DS1, however DS2 is worse than human level performance on noisy data. The relative gap between DS2 and human level performance is larger when the data comes from a real noisy environment instead of synthetically adding noise to clean speech.
items.zh: 我们使用最近完成的第三届CHiME挑战赛[4]公开提供的测试集来测试在噪声语音上的性能。该数据集包含1320段来自WSJ测试集的语音，这些语音在各种噪声环境中朗读，包括公交车、咖啡馆、街道和步行区。CHiME集还包括1320段来自相同环境的模拟噪声语音，以及包含相同说话人在无噪声环境中朗读相同语音的控制集。控制集和噪声集结果之间的差异提供了网络处理各种真实和合成噪声条件能力的度量。CHiME音频有6个通道，使用所有通道可以带来显著的性能提升[69]。我们在所有结果中使用单通道，因为多通道音频在大多数设备上并不普遍。表15显示DS2相比DS1有显著改进，但在噪声数据上DS2仍差于人类水平。当数据来自真实噪声环境而非在干净语音上合成添加噪声时，DS2与人类水平之间的相对差距更大。

items.en: In Table 16 we compare several architectures trained on the Mandarin Chinese speech, on a development set of 2000 utterances as well as a test set of 1882 examples of noisy speech. This development set was also used to tune the decoding parameters We see that the deepest model with 2D-invariant convolution and BatchNorm outperforms the shallow RNN by 48% relative, thus continuing the trend that we saw with the English system—multiple layers of bidirectional recurrence improves performance substantially.
items.zh: 在表16中，我们比较了在中文普通话语音上训练的几种架构，在一个包含2000段语音的开发集和一个包含1882段噪声语音的测试集上进行了评估。该开发集也用于调整解码参数。我们看到，具有2D不变卷积和BatchNorm的最深模型相比浅层RNN相对提升了48%，延续了我们在英文系统中看到的趋势——多层双向循环显著提升了性能。

items.en: We find that our best Mandarin Chinese speech system transcribes short voice-query like utterances better than a typical Mandarin Chinese speaker. To benchmark against humans we ran a test with 100 randomly selected utterances and had a group of 5 humans label all of them together. The group of humans had an error rate of 4.0% as compared to the speech systems performance of 3.7%. We also compared a single human transcriber to the speech system on 250 randomly selected utterances. In this case the speech system performs much better: 9.7% for the human compared to 5.7% for the speech model.
items.zh: 我们发现，我们最好的中文普通话语音系统在转录短语音查询类话语时优于典型的普通话使用者。为了与人类进行基准比较，我们进行了一项测试，随机选取了100段语音，并让一组5人共同标注所有语音。这组人的错误率为4.0%，而语音系统的性能为3.7%。我们还将单个人类转录员与语音系统在250段随机选取的语音上进行了比较。在这种情况下，语音系统表现更好：人类错误率为9.7%，而语音模型为5.7%。

items.en: Real-world applications usually require a speech system to transcribe in real time or with relatively low latency. The system used in Section 6.1 is not well-designed for this task, for several reasons. First, since the RNN has several bidirectional layers, transcribing the first part of an utterance requires the entire utterance to be presented to the RNN. Second, since we use a wide beam when decoding with a language model, beam search can be expensive, particularly in Mandarin where the number of possible next characters is very large (around 6000). Third, as described in Section 3, we normalize power across an entire utterance, which again requires the entire utterance to be available in advance.
items.zh: 实际应用通常要求语音系统实时或低延迟地转录。第6.1节中使用的系统并不适合此任务，原因有几个。首先，由于RNN有多个双向层，转录话语的第一部分需要将整个话语输入RNN。其次，由于我们在使用语言模型解码时使用了宽波束，波束搜索可能很昂贵，尤其是在中文中，可能的下一字符数量非常大（约6000个）。第三，如第3节所述，我们对整个话语进行功率归一化，这再次需要提前获得整个话语。

items.en: We solve the power normalization problem by using some statistics from our training set to perform an adaptive normalization of speech inputs during online transcription. We can solve the other problems by modifying our network and decoding procedure to produce a model that performs almost as well while having much lower latency. We focus on our Mandarin system since some aspects of that system are more challenging to deploy (e.g. the large character set), but the same techniques could also be applied in English.
items.zh: 我们通过使用训练集中的一些统计量，在在线转录期间对语音输入进行自适应归一化，解决了功率归一化问题。我们可以通过修改网络和解码程序来解决其他问题，从而产生一个性能几乎相同但延迟更低的模型。我们专注于中文系统，因为该系统的某些方面部署更具挑战性（例如，大的字符集），但同样的技术也可以应用于英文。

items.en: In this section, latency refers to the computational latency of our speech system as measured from the end of an utterance until the transcription is produced. This latency does not include data transmission over the internet, and does not measure latency from the beginning of an utterance until the first transcription is produced. We focus on latency from end of utterance to transcription because it is important to applications using speech recognition.
items.zh: 在本节中，延迟指的是我们的语音系统从话语结束到生成转录的计算延迟。该延迟不包括通过互联网的数据传输，也不测量从话语开始到生成第一个转录的延迟。我们关注从话语结束到转录的延迟，因为它对使用语音识别的应用很重要。

items.capEn: Figure 5: Probability that a request is processed in a batch of given size
items.capZh: 图5：请求以给定批次大小处理的概率

items.en: In order to deploy our relatively large deep neural networks at low latency, we have paid special attention to efficiency during deployment. Most internet applications process requests individually as they arrive in the data center. This makes for a straightforward implementation where each request can be managed by one thread. However, processing requests individually is inefficient computationally, for two main reasons. Firstly, when processing requests individually, the processor must load all the weights of the network for each request. This lowers the arithmetic intensity of the workload, and tends to make the computation memory bandwidth bound, as it is difficult to effectively use on-chip caches when requests are presented individually. Secondly, the amount of parallelism that can be exploited to classify one request is limited, making it difficult to exploit SIMD or multi-core parallelism. RNNs are especially challenging to deploy because evaluating RNNs sample by sample relies on sequential matrix vector multiplications, which are bandwidth bound and difficult to parallelize.
items.zh: 为了以低延迟部署我们相对较大的深度神经网络，我们在部署过程中特别关注效率。大多数互联网应用在数据中心按请求到达的顺序单独处理请求。这使得实现简单，每个请求可以由一个线程管理。然而，单独处理请求在计算上效率低下，主要有两个原因。首先，当单独处理请求时，处理器必须为每个请求加载网络的所有权重。这降低了工作负载的算术强度，并倾向于使计算受内存带宽限制，因为当请求单独呈现时，很难有效利用片上缓存。其次，可用于分类一个请求的并行度有限，使得难以利用SIMD或多核并行性。RNN尤其难以部署，因为逐样本评估RNN依赖于顺序的矩阵向量乘法，这受带宽限制且难以并行化。

items.en: To overcome these issues, we built a batching scheduler called Batch Dispatch that assembles streams of data from user requests into batches before performing forward propagation on these batches. In this case, there is a tradeoff between increased batch size, and consequently improved efficiency, and increased latency. The more we buffer user requests to assemble a large batch, the longer users must wait for their results. This places constraints on the amount of batching we can perform.
items.zh: 为了克服这些问题，我们构建了一个名为Batch Dispatch的批处理调度器，它在对这些批次进行前向传播之前，将用户请求的数据流组装成批次。在这种情况下，需要在增加批次大小（从而提高效率）和增加延迟之间进行权衡。我们缓冲用户请求以组装大批次的时间越长，用户等待结果的时间就越长。这对我们可以执行的批处理量施加了限制。

items.en: We use an eager batching scheme that processes each batch as soon as the previous batch is completed, regardless of how much work is ready by that point. This scheduling algorithm has proved to be the best at reducing end-user latency, despite the fact that it is less efficient computationally, since it does not attempt to maximize batch size.
items.zh: 我们使用一种急切批处理方案，即一旦前一批次完成，就立即处理下一批次，无论此时有多少工作已准备好。这种调度算法已被证明在减少最终用户延迟方面效果最好，尽管它在计算上效率较低，因为它不试图最大化批次大小。

items.capEn: Figure 6: Median and 98 percentile latencies as a function of server load
items.capZh: 图6：中位数和98百分位延迟随服务器负载的变化

items.en: We see in Figure 6, that our system achieves a median latency of 44 ms, and a 98 percentile latency of 70 ms when loaded with 10 concurrent streams. As the load increases on the server, the batching scheduler shifts work to more efficient batches, which keeps latency low. This shows that Batch Dispatch makes it possible to deploy these large models at high throughput and low latency.
items.zh: 我们在图6中看到，当系统加载10个并发流时，中位数延迟为44毫秒，98百分位延迟为70毫秒。随着服务器负载增加，批处理调度器将工作转移到更高效的批次，从而保持低延迟。这表明Batch Dispatch使得以高吞吐量和低延迟部署这些大型模型成为可能。

full.secZh: 7.2 部署优化的矩阵乘法核

items.en: We have found that deploying our models using half-precision (16-bit) floating-point arithmetic does not measurably change recognition accuracy. Because deployment does not require any updates to the network weights, it is far less sensitive to numerical precision than training. Using half-precision arithmetic saves memory space and bandwidth, which is especially useful for deployment, since RNN evaluation is dominated by the cost of caching and streaming the weight matrices.
items.zh: 我们发现，使用半精度（16位）浮点运算部署我们的模型不会显著改变识别准确率。由于部署不需要更新网络权重，它对数值精度的敏感度远低于训练。使用半精度运算节省了内存空间和带宽，这对部署特别有用，因为RNN评估主要受权重矩阵的缓存和流传输成本主导。

items.en: As seen in Section 7.1, the batch size during deployment is much smaller than in training. We found that standard BLAS libraries are inefficient at this batch size. To overcome this, we wrote our own half-precision matrix-matrix multiply kernel. For 10 simultaneous streams over 90 percent of batches are for N≤4𝑁4N\leq 4, a regime where the matrix multiply will be bandwidth bound. We store the A𝐴A matrix transposed to maximize bandwidth by using the widest possible vector loads while avoiding transposition after loading. Each warp computes four rows of output for all N𝑁N output columns. Note that for N≤4𝑁4N\leq 4 the B𝐵B matrix fits entirely in the L1 cache. This scheme achieves 90 percent of peak bandwidth for N≤4𝑁4N\leq 4 but starts to lose efficiency for larger N𝑁N as the B𝐵B matrix stops fitting into the L1 cache. Nonetheless, it continues to provide improved performance over existing libraries up to N=10𝑁10N=10.
items.zh: 如第7.1节所示，部署期间的批次大小远小于训练时。我们发现标准BLAS库在此批次大小下效率低下。为了克服这一点，我们编写了自己的半精度矩阵-矩阵乘法内核。对于10个并发流，超过90%的批次N≤4，在这种模式下矩阵乘法将受带宽限制。我们存储转置后的A矩阵，通过使用最宽的向量加载来最大化带宽，同时避免加载后转置。每个warp计算所有N个输出列的四行输出。注意，对于N≤4，B矩阵完全适合L1缓存。该方案在N≤4时达到峰值带宽的90%，但随着N增大，B矩阵不再适合L1缓存，效率开始下降。尽管如此，它在N=10之前仍比现有库提供更好的性能。

items.en: Performing the beam search involves repeated lookups in the n-gram language model, most of which translate to uncached reads from memory. The direct implementation of beam search means that each time-step dispatches one lookup per character for each beam. In Mandarin, this results in over 1M lookups per 40ms stride of speech data, which is too slow for deployment. To deal with this problem, we use a heuristic to further prune the beam search. Rather than considering all characters as viable additions to the beam, we only consider the fewest number of characters whose cumulative probability is at least p𝑝p. In practice, we have found that p=0.99𝑝0.99p=0.99 works well. Additionally, we limit ourselves to no more than 40 characters. This speeds up the Mandarin language model lookup time by a factor of 150x, and has a negligible effect on the CER (0.1-0.3% relative).
items.zh: 执行波束搜索涉及在n-gram语言模型中进行重复查找，其中大部分转换为未缓存的读取。波束搜索的直接实现意味着每个时间步为每个波束的每个字符调度一次查找。在中文中，这导致每40毫秒语音数据步长超过100万次查找，对于部署来说太慢。为了解决这个问题，我们使用启发式方法进一步剪枝波束搜索。我们不将所有字符视为波束的可行添加，而是只考虑累积概率至少为p的最少字符数。在实践中，我们发现p=0.99效果很好。此外，我们将字符数限制为不超过40个。这使中文语言模型查找时间加快了150倍，对CER的影响可以忽略不计（相对0.1-0.3%）。

items.en: We can deploy our system at low latency and high throughput without sacrificing much accuracy. On a held-out set of 2000 utterances, our research system achieves 5.81 character error rate whereas the deployed system achieves 6.10 character error rate. This is only a 5% relative degradation for the deployed system. In order to accomplish this, we employ a neural network architecture with low deployment latency, reduce the precision of our network to 16-bit, built a batching scheduler to more efficiently evaluate RNNs, and find a simple heuristic to reduce beam search cost. The model has five forward-only recurrent layers with 2560 hidden units, one row convolution layer (Section 3.7) with τ=19𝜏19\tau=19, and one fully-connected layer with 2560 hidden units. These techniques allow us to deploy Deep Speech at low cost to interactive applications.
items.zh: 我们可以在不牺牲太多准确率的情况下，以低延迟和高吞吐量部署我们的系统。在一个包含2000段语音的保留集上，我们的研究系统实现了5.81%的字符错误率，而部署系统实现了6.10%的字符错误率。部署系统仅相对下降了5%。为了实现这一点，我们采用了具有低部署延迟的神经网络架构，将网络精度降低到16位，构建了批处理调度器以更有效地评估RNN，并找到了一个简单的启发式方法来降低波束搜索成本。该模型有五个前向循环层，每层2560个隐藏单元，一个行卷积层（第3.7节），τ=19，以及一个全连接层，有2560个隐藏单元。这些技术使我们能够以低成本将Deep Speech部署到交互式应用中。

items.en: End-to-end deep learning presents the exciting opportunity to improve speech recognition systems continually with increases in data and computation. Indeed, our results show that, compared to the previous incarnation, Deep Speech has significantly closed the gap in transcription performance with human workers by leveraging more data and larger models. Further, since the approach is highly generic, we’ve shown that it can quickly be applied to new languages. Creating high-performing recognizers for two very different languages, English and Mandarin, required essentially no expert knowledge of the languages. Finally, we have also shown that this approach can be efficiently deployed by batching user requests together on a GPU server, paving the way to deliver end-to-end Deep Learning technologies to users.
items.zh: 端到端深度学习提供了令人兴奋的机会，可以通过增加数据和计算来持续改进语音识别系统。事实上，我们的结果表明，与之前的版本相比，Deep Speech通过利用更多数据和更大的模型，显著缩小了与人类转录性能的差距。此外，由于该方法高度通用，我们已证明它可以快速应用于新语言。为两种截然不同的语言（英语和中文）创建高性能识别器基本上不需要语言的专业知识。最后，我们还表明，通过将用户请求在GPU服务器上批处理，可以高效部署这种方法，为向用户提供端到端深度学习技术铺平了道路。

items.en: To achieve these results, we have explored various network architectures, finding several effective techniques: enhancements to numerical optimization through SortaGrad and Batch Normalization, evaluation of RNNs with larger strides with bigram outputs for English, searching through both bidirectional and unidirectional models. This exploration was powered by a well optimized, High Performance Computing inspired training system that allows us to train new, full-scale models on our large datasets in just a few days.
items.zh: 为了取得这些结果，我们探索了各种网络架构，发现了几种有效的技术：通过SortaGrad和Batch Normalization增强数值优化，对英文使用双字母输出以更大步长评估RNN，以及搜索双向和单向模型。这一探索得到了一个经过良好优化、受高性能计算启发的训练系统的支持，该系统使我们能够在短短几天内在大数据集上训练新的全尺寸模型。

items.en: Overall, we believe our results confirm and exemplify the value of end-to-end Deep Learning methods for speech recognition in several settings. In those cases where our system is not already comparable to humans, the difference has fallen rapidly, largely because of application-agnostic Deep Learning techniques. We believe these techniques will continue to scale, and thus conclude that the vision of a single speech system that outperforms humans in most scenarios is imminently achievable.
items.zh: 总体而言，我们相信我们的结果证实并体现了端到端深度学习方法在多种场景下对语音识别的价值。在那些我们的系统尚未与人类相当的情况下，差距已迅速缩小，这主要归功于与应用无关的深度学习技术。我们相信这些技术将继续扩展，因此得出结论，一个在大多数场景中超越人类的单一语音系统的愿景即将实现。

items.en: We are grateful to Baidu’s speech technology group for help with data preparation and useful conversations. We would like to thank Scott Gray, Amir Khosrowshahi and all of Nervana Systems for their excellent matrix multiply routines and useful discussions. We would also like to thank Natalia Gimelshein of NVIDIA for useful discussions and thoughts on implementing our fast deployment matrix multiply.
items.zh: 我们感谢百度语音技术组在数据准备方面的帮助和有益的讨论。感谢Scott Gray、Amir Khosrowshahi以及Nervana Systems团队提供的优秀矩阵乘法例程和有益讨论。同时感谢NVIDIA的Natalia Gimelshein在实现快速部署矩阵乘法方面的有益讨论和想法。
